name: generate-background
description: Bria Background Generation allows for efficient swapping of backgrounds in images via text prompts or reference image, delivering realistic and polished results. Trained exclusively on licensed data for safe and risk-free commercial use

bg_prompt.description: Text description of the new scene or background. Either bg_prompt or ref_image_url must be provided
bg_prompt.title: Bg Prompt

enhance_ref_image.description: [DEPRECATED] Enhance reference image. No longer used in V2 API.
enhance_ref_image.title: Enhance Ref Image

fast.description: [DEPRECATED] Use fast mode. No longer used in V2 API.
fast.title: Fast

force_rmbg.description: [DEPRECATED] Force background removal. No longer used in V2 API.
force_rmbg.title: Force Rmbg

original_quality.description: Retain original input image size, otherwise scale to 1MP
original_quality.title: Original Quality

ref_image_file.description: Reference image file for background generation
ref_image_file.title: Ref Image File

ref_image_url.description: URL of reference image for background generation. Either bg_prompt or ref_image_url must be provided
ref_image_url.title: Ref Image Url

refine_prompt.description: Refine the prompt for optimal results
refine_prompt.title: Refine Prompt

seed.description: Random seed. Set for reproducible generation
seed.title: Seed
